text_excerpt: How I can Help - Mike Reader MP Skip to content Home Find Help News About Insights Contact Home Find Help News About Insights Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram HOW TO GET HELP Scroll to find out about how I can help Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here How I can help: I can highlight constituent concerns by asking questions, initiating debates, or lobbying for policy changes. I can help resolve problems with public services like benefits, housing, immigration, or healthcare by contacting relevant government departments or agencies. I can write letters, attend meetings, or apply pressure on local councils or organisations to address specific issues. What I can't do: I cannot intervene in disputes between private parties, such as employer-employee conflicts or custody cases. I cannot influence court rulings or intervene in legal cases already decided by the judiciary. I cannot resolve matters outside of my jurisdiction, such as visa or immigration issues involving foreign governments. GET IN TOUCH Email Me mike.reader.casework@parliament.uk Book an Appointment I run weekly constituency surgeries for face-to-face support. Book a Surgery Appointment Find Help 01604 969523 mike.reader.mp@parliament.uk Mike Reader MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Latest Latest News Videos In the media Insights All News About Biography Journey Contact Book appointment Meeting & events Social Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Linkedin Follow me on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Linkedin Privacy Policy Cookies Policy Terms of Use Sign up to my newsletter Keep up to date with my work as your MP. Email First Name Last Name I consent to receiving updates from Mike about his work in Northamption South. I understand I can opt out at any time. See Privacy Policy for more details. Subscribe for updates Your email address is never shared with any third parties.
